title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 Part 1 (11) + S1 Part 2 (12, eps 12-23) + S2 (25, eps 24-48). Manga complete at 334 chapters (Yuka Fujikawa adaptation). Both the anime and the manga follow the light novel; pacing differs. Per-arc chapter boundaries approximate.
